# Perplexity API Features & Announcements

## April 2026
- **n8n Integration** — Native node with Chat Completions, Agent, Search, and Embeddings support via visual canvas
- **OpenClaw Integration** — Terminal AI agent now supports Perplexity Search API as native web search provider
- **AWS Marketplace** — API credits available through AWS for consolidated billing and procurement
- **`/v1/models` Endpoint** — New GET /v1/models endpoint lists all available Agent API models in OpenAI-compatible format

## March 2026
- **Agent API Third-Party Models** — Support added for GPT-5.4, NVIDIA Nemotron, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview
- **Model Deprecations** — Gemini 2.5 Flash and Pro removed; **canonical endpoint now /v1/agent**

## February 2026
- **Agent API** — General availability launched with production guidance and OpenAI-compatibility
- **Embeddings API** — Released with guides for standard/contextualized embeddings and semantic search

## December 2025
- **Media Classifier** — Automatically detects visual content needs
- **Search API Enhancements** — New `max_tokens`, `last_updated_filter`, Vercel AI SDK compatibility
- **sonar-reasoning model deprecated** (December 15, 2025)

## November 2025
- **Pro Search** — Multi-step reasoning through intelligent tool orchestration
- **MCP Server One-Click Installation** — Auto-configuration for Cursor, VS Code, Claude Desktop, Claude Code
- Four MCP tools: `perplexity_search`, `perplexity_ask`, `perplexity_research`, `perplexity_reason`

## October 2025
- **Official Perplexity SDKs** — Python and TypeScript
- **Interactive Search API Playground**
- **New Search Capabilities** — language_preference, search_domain_filter

## September 2025
- **File Attachments Support** (PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT, RTF)
- **Standalone Search API**
- **API Key Rotation**

## Last Fetched
2026-04-19 — New: n8n Integration, OpenClaw Integration, AWS Marketplace, /v1/models endpoint (April 2026), /v1/agent canonical endpoint + third-party models in Agent API (March 2026)
